subsidyType: city-managed annual lead service replacement program with DSMI-driven eligibility and free testing for eligible properties
publicSideCovered: yes the city manages replacement obligations under the state schedule
privateSideCovered: replacement scope depends on DSMI results and city coordination with the property
propertyRules: eligibility is driven by the DSMI point-of-entry inspection results and the current replacement schedule
contractorRules: city staff and contractors coordinate inspections testing and scheduled replacement work
